title: Epigram, On Winning A Young Lady's Money At Cards.
content:
How fairly Fortune all her gifts imparts;
    We win your money, Ann, and you our hearts.
meaning:
John Carr (Sir)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epigram, On Winning A Young Lady's Money At Cards."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
